# `vendor-dcs` sequences

<!-- Generated by `qdb generate reference` from `db/vendor-dcs.toml`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Sixel Graphics Preserve (`vendor.dcs.sixel.preserve`)

Sixel is preserved as DCS syntax with fixture evidence; no renderer, image model, or transfer policy is exposed yet.

- Direction: bidirectional
- Syntax: `DCS params q sixel-data ST`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/vendor/advanced/sixel.seq`](../../../fixtures/vendor/advanced/sixel.seq), [`fixtures/vendor/advanced/negative/recovery/sixel_unterminated.seq`](../../../fixtures/vendor/advanced/negative/recovery/sixel_unterminated.seq)
- Notes: Promote only with a source-backed graphics payload model and size limits.

## ReGIS Graphics Preserve (`vendor.dcs.regis.preserve`)

ReGIS is preserved as a historical vector-graphics DCS payload.

- Direction: bidirectional
- Syntax: `DCS p ReGIS-commands ST`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/vendor/advanced/regis.seq`](../../../fixtures/vendor/advanced/regis.seq), [`fixtures/vendor/advanced/negative/recovery/regis_unterminated.seq`](../../../fixtures/vendor/advanced/negative/recovery/regis_unterminated.seq)
- Notes: No typed model is planned until a real application or terminal-profile need appears.

## DECUDK User-Defined Keys Preserve (`vendor.dcs.decudk.preserve`)

DECUDK mutates terminal key definitions on compatible DEC/xterm profiles.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `DCS Ps ; Ps | key-definitions ST`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/vendor/advanced/decudk.seq`](../../../fixtures/vendor/advanced/decudk.seq), [`fixtures/vendor/advanced/negative/recovery/decudk_unterminated.seq`](../../../fixtures/vendor/advanced/negative/recovery/decudk_unterminated.seq)
- Notes: Kept preserve-only because modern applications should prefer explicit input protocols over redefining keys.

## DECRSPS Restore Presentation State Preserve (`vendor.dcs.decrsps.preserve`)

DECRSPS restores terminal presentation state from a DCS payload.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `DCS Ps $ p presentation-state ST`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/vendor/advanced/decrsps.seq`](../../../fixtures/vendor/advanced/decrsps.seq), [`fixtures/vendor/advanced/negative/recovery/decrsps_unterminated.seq`](../../../fixtures/vendor/advanced/negative/recovery/decrsps_unterminated.seq)
- Notes: Kept preserve-only because a typed API would need a complete presentation-state model and careful cleanup semantics.
